title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Documented shared AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md instructions, committed iQ Context durable state, added source-control policy for iQ Context files, and clarified that subscription-backed provider extraction should use dedicated sub-agents to keep transcript-heavy context out of the main session.
next_actions: Resume with host/session-backed provider design: define the sub-agent JSON handoff contract and how the engine ingests externally supplied provider output.
continuation_hint: Documented shared AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md instructions, committed iQ Context durable state, added source-control policy for iQ Context files, and clarified that subscription-backed provider extraction should use dedicated sub-agents to keep transcript-heavy context out of the main session.
